_note: Seed mirroring sandbox `square_list_catalog`. Source: docs/sandbox/SNAPSHOT.md. The agent reads the sandbox at runtime; this seed lets the website render before /api/chat is up. Prices in USD cents; lead_time_hours derived from prep minutes (kitchen capacity is its own concern).

products.name: Honey Cake (slice)
products.description: Our signature — homemade-tasting honey cake. By the slice, fresh from the case.

products.name: Whole Honey Cake
products.description: Whole signature honey cake — feeds about a dozen. Hand-decorated, hand-packed.

products.name: Pistachio Roll
products.description: Soft sponge rolled with pistachio cream. By the slice.

products.name: Custom Birthday Cake
products.description: Designed with you — flavors, fillings, message, photo or fondant. Serves 12–20.

products.name: Office Dessert Box
products.description: Curated assortment for offices and gatherings — slices, rolls, mini cakes.

lead_time.note: Kitchen has 420 minutes/day total; per-product capacity is the limiting constraint. Always check via `kitchen_get_capacity` before promising.

pickup.address: Sugar Land, TX (exact address shared at confirmation)

allergens.shared_kitchen: Eggs, dairy, gluten, tree nuts handled in same kitchen — cross-contamination possible.
allergens.critical_allergy_protocol: For severe allergies, please escalate — Askhat reviews each request.

cancellation.note: Late cancellations are charged in full because the kitchen has already worked.
